{{CargoRelic
|name=Christmas Bell
|class_id=20442
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This bell once belonged to a reindeer that served Santa Claus for many years. But after its employer disappeared, it lost its job and was left homeless. In order to make a living, it pawned almost all of its possessions, except for this bell which it kept by its side...
|fame=31
|art=15
|fth=13
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +1<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss2=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +2<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss3=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss4=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss7=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
